title: Agent Olympics Run-Directory Artifact Manifest
description: A manifest.yaml file placed in each run directory (runs/<season>/<round>/<run-id>/). Describes all artifacts in the directory, their checksums, lifecycle state, and retention rules. Enables automated validation, archival, and safe scrubbing of run outputs without inspecting artifact content directly.

run_id.description: The run identifier this manifest describes. Must match the parent directory name.

round_id.description: The round this run belongs to.

task_id.description: The task executed in this run.

agent_id.description: The agent or participant that produced this run.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of this run's artifact set.

status_history.description: Ordered history of status transitions for this run.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the run directory was created.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last manifest update.

path.description: Relative path from the run directory to this artifact file.

kind.description: Artifact kind for categorization and retention rules.

content_type.description: MIME type or format hint, e.g. 'text/yaml', 'text/plain', 'application/json'.

size_bytes.description: File size in bytes at manifest creation time.

checksum.description: Content integrity hash. Required for non-metadata artifacts.

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm. sha256 is preferred for integrity verification.

retention.description: Retention class for automated scrubbing. See docs/run-directory.md for definitions.

redacted.description: True if the artifact has been scrubbed of secrets.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata key-value pairs (e.g. tool name, step number).

then.description: Non-manifest artifacts should have a checksum when the file is stable.

artifacts.description: Inventory of all artifacts in this run directory. Generated by the runner or round engine when the run directory is created.

retention_policy.description: Default retention policy for this run's artifacts. Individual artifact retention fields override this.

default_retention.description: Default retention class for all artifacts in this run.

cleanup_after_days.description: Number of days after which scrubbed artifacts may be deleted. Applies to ephemeral and round-retention artifacts.

scrubbing_required.description: If true, artifacts must be redaction-scrubbed before any automated cleanup.

references.description: Cross-references to external resources beyond the run directory.

result_packet_path.description: Path to the result-packet.yaml file (relative to run directory).

evidence_bundle_path.description: Path to the evidence-bundle.yaml file (relative to run directory).

trace_path.description: Path to the trace.yaml file (relative to run directory).

judge_record_path.description: Path to the judge-record.yaml file (relative to run directory).

scoreboard_path.description: Path to the scoreboard.yaml file (relative to run directory).

fixture_bundle_ref.description: Reference to the fixture bundle used for this run.

task_envelope_ref.description: Reference to the task envelope used for this run.

oracle_ref.description: Reference to the oracle/answer key (judge access only).

evidence_dir.description: Path to the evidence/ subdirectory (relative to run directory).

run_metadata.description: Extensible metadata for runner-specific or round-specific fields.

runner.description: Identifier of the runner/adapter that created this run.

duration_seconds.description: Total wall-clock duration of the run in seconds.
